front: Novel: typed on a single 120-foot scroll; follows Sal Paradise and the 'holy goof' Dean Moriarty on cross-country drives
Novel: protagonist meets 'the cutest little Mexican girl' on a bus and picks cotton with Terry and Ricky in Sabinal
Novel: protagonist drives to Denver and meets the poet Carlo Marx, modeled on Allen Ginsberg
Novel: Gary Snyder fictionalized as Japhy Ryder; narrator Ray Smith climbs Matterhorn Peak; ends at fire lookout on Desolation Peak
Poem: 242 'choruses' with Buddhist influences, written in the title city
Author: manifesto 'Essentials of Spontaneous Prose' advocates forgoing periods for the 'vigorous space dash' to imitate a 'jazz musician drawing breath'
Author: co-wrote And the Hippos Were Boiled in Their Tanks with William S. Burroughs about the killing of David Kammerer
Author: prose-poem describing 'innumerable holy ghosts, buddhies, and savior gods... smiling'
back: The Scripture of the Golden Eternity (Jack Kerouac)
